message:
Add comprehensive unit tests for tracker package coverage

Expand test coverage with focused tests for previously untested paths:

scanNullTerminated tests:
- Empty at EOF, single token, multiple tokens, final token at EOF
- Need-more-data scenarios, empty token edge case

StateChange tracking tests:
- Coalesce with empty tracker
- Since/SinceByType/SinceBySession with Details map deep copy
- Verifies returned copies don't affect original entries

FileChangeStore tests:
- Since with various time windows
- Empty store handling
- Ring buffer wrap-around behavior
- Zero limit default (gets 500)
- Auto-timestamp on zero Timestamp field
- All() ordering without wrap

These tests strengthen the tracker package's coverage without changing
any production logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
